positive: A minimalist, line-art depiction of a sleepy sloth hanging from a tropical leaf, rendered in delicate black ink on a creamy background. Style should be Scandinavian folk art, clean, elegant, and highly detailed. Use cross-hatching techniques for texture. --ar 1:1
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, messy, cluttered
